Muldrotha, the Gravetide.name: Muldrotha, the Gravetide
Muldrotha, the Gravetide.text: During each of your turns, you may play one permanent card of each permanent type from your graveyard.

Eternal Witness.name: Eternal Witness
Eternal Witness.text: When Eternal Witness enters the battlefield, you may return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

Dramatic Reversal.name: Dramatic Reversal
Dramatic Reversal.text: Untap all nonland permanents you control.

Isochron Scepter.name: Isochron Scepter
Isochron Scepter.text:
Imprint — When Isochron Scepter enters the battlefield, you may exile an instant card with mana value 2 or less from your hand.
{2}, {T}: You may copy the exiled card. If you do, you may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.
